```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Optimize regex-heavy code paths for speed and safety.
---
Task:
Find expensive regular expressions and replace inefficient matching patterns.
Requirements:
Identify catastrophic backtracking risks, compile/cache usage, and match frequency hotspots.
Constraints:
Preserve match semantics and input validation guarantees across all edge cases.
Success Criteria:
Demonstrate faster matching times and elimination of pathological worst-case behavior.
```
